---
title: "Agentic Basics"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="slide-embed">
  <iframe
    src="slides/agentic-basics/"
    title="Agentic Basics slides"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>

<p class="slide-embed-link">
  <a href="slides/agentic-basics/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    Open slides in a new tab →
  </a>
</p>

<style>
  .slide-embed {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #ddd);
    border-radius: 6px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .slide-embed iframe {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: 0;
  }
  .slide-embed-link {
    text-align: right;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
</style>
```
